use_cases: Display loading status while processing async operations
Show task completion confirmation with animated checkmark transition
Provide visual feedback for workflow state changes in dashboards
Indicate order or payment processing status in e-commerce apps
Give build or deployment status updates in developer tools
ai_summary: An animated status badge component that transitions between loading and completed states using framer-motion. Features smooth y-axis sliding animations with opacity and scale transitions, displaying a loader during processing and a checkmark confirmation after completion. Configurable timing for animation duration and auto-dismiss behavior.
